transcript: i had a huge craving for pizza rolls so i decided to make a healthier gluten-free version i'm using almond flour tortillas first you're going to want to warm your tortillas on a pan for a little bit so that they're more flexible then add pizza sauce cheese and any toppings that you like and gently and carefully roll them like this you can add any toppings you like i'm doing spinach and turkey pepperoni just be careful not to stuff them them too much or it's gonna be hard to roll them. Spray them with a little bit of avocado oil and spray your pan as well. Cook them for a few minutes per side and then carefully flip them. You want them to get nice and crispy. Once they're cooked well on both sides, just slice them up, serve with your favorite dipping sauce and enjoy. These are seriously one of the best things I've made in a really long time.
